victorychart.categories: {x: ['Amazon','Whole Foods Market','Delta','Marriott Hotels & Resorts','Uber','Office Depot LLC','Staples Business Advantage','FedEx','Southwest Airlines','Target','Costco Wholesale','Apple Store','International Business Machines Corporation']}

victoryaxis.tickformat: ['Amazon','Whole Foods Market','Delta','Marriott Hotels & Resorts','Uber','Office Depot LLC','Staples Business Advantage','FedEx','Southwest Airlines','Target','Costco Wholesale','Apple Store','International Business Machines Corporation']
victoryaxis.style: {axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: 'transparent'}, tickLabels: {fill: '#76847E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 24}}

{axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: '#E6E1DA', strokeWidth: 1}, tickLabels: {fill: '#76847E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 8}}

victorybar.data: [{x: 'Amazon', y: 945},{x: 'Whole Foods Market', y: 820},{x: 'Delta', y: 760},{x: 'Marriott Hotels & Resorts', y: 690},{x: 'Uber', y: 610},{x: 'Office Depot LLC', y: 540},{x: 'Staples Business Advantage', y: 480},{x: 'FedEx', y: 390},{x: 'Southwest Airlines', y: 320},{x: 'Target', y: 250},{x: 'Costco Wholesale', y: 210},{x: 'Apple Store', y: 175},{x: 'International Business Machines Corporation', y: 145}]
